languages.text: "Второй вариант предполагает использование наработок {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магоса{/g}. Небольшая тактическая группа, сопровождающая {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеров{/g}, проникает в глубины гробницы. Психическое эхо привлекает Погонщиц. Шансы выживания отряда минимальны, и мы не знаем, насколько эффективными окажутся твари против железных мертвецов. И сколь долго будут оставаться в гробнице, прежде чем уйдут".

traits.locale_text: "Второй вариант предполагает использование наработок {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магоса{/g}. Небольшая тактическая группа, сопровождающая {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеров{/g}, проникает в глубины гробницы. Психическое эхо привлекает Погонщиц. Шансы выживания отряда минимальны, и мы не знаем, насколько эффективными окажутся твари против железных мертвецов. И сколь долго будут оставаться в гробнице, прежде чем уйдут".

languages.text: "The second option involves utilising the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}'s findings. A small tactical team will escort the {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."
languages.original_text: "Второй вариант предполагает использование наработок {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магоса{/g}. Небольшая тактическая группа, сопровождающая {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}псайкеров{/g}, проникает в глубины гробницы. Психическое эхо привлекает Погонщиц. Шансы выживания отряда минимальны, и мы не знаем, насколько эффективными окажутся твари против железных мертвецов. И сколь долго будут оставаться в гробнице, прежде чем уйдут".

traits.locale_text: "The second option involves utilising the Magos's findings. A small tactical team will escort the psykers deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."

"The second option involves utilising the Magos's findings. A small tactical team will escort the psykers deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."

"The second option involves utilising the Magos's findings. A small tactical team will escort the psykers deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."

languages.text: 「第二の選択肢は{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}マゴス{/g}の調査結果を利用することです。小規模な戦術チームが、{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}サイキック能力者{/g}たちを墓地深くまで護衛します。サイキックの残響がドルーバーを引き寄せるのです。このグループの生存率は極めて低く、鉄の死に対して、その生き物はどれほど効果を発揮するのか、また墓地から出ていくまでどれほど時間をかけるのかはわかりません」
languages.original_text: "The second option involves utilising the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}'s findings. A small tactical team will escort the {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."

traits.locale_text: 「第二の選択肢はマゴスの調査結果を利用することです。小規模な戦術チームが、サイキック能力者たちを墓地深くまで護衛します。サイキックの残響がドルーバーを引き寄せるのです。このグループの生存率は極めて低く、鉄の死に対して、その生き物はどれほど効果を発揮するのか、また墓地から出ていくまでどれほど時間をかけるのかはわかりません。」

「第二の選択肢は{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}マゴス{/g}の調査結果を利用することです。小規模な戦術チームが、{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}サイキック能力者{/g}たちを墓地深くまで護衛します。サイキックの残響がドルーバーを引き寄せるのです。このグループの生存率は極めて低く、鉄の死に対して、その生き物はどれほど効果を発揮するのか、また墓地から出ていくまでどれほど時間をかけるのかはわかりません」

languages.text: «La segunda opción emplea los descubrimientos del {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g}. Una pequeña unidad táctica escoltará a los {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psíquicos{/g} a lo más profundo de la tumba. Los Pastores se ven atraídos por los ecos psíquicos. La probabilidad de que el grupo sobreviva es insignificante, y no sabemos cómo de eficaces serán esas criaturas contra los muertos metálicos, ni el tiempo que permanecerán en la tumba antes de marcharse».
languages.original_text: "The second option involves utilising the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}'s findings. A small tactical team will escort the {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."

traits.locale_text: «La segunda opción emplea los descubrimientos del {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g}. Una pequeña unidad táctica escoltará a los {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psíquicos{/g} a lo más profundo de la tumba. Los Pastores se ven atraídos por los ecos psíquicos. La probabilidad de que el grupo sobreviva es insignificante, y no sabemos cómo de eficaces serán esas criaturas contra los muertos metálicos, ni el tiempo que permanecerán en la tumba antes de marcharse».

languages.text: “方案二是利用{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}的研究成果。既然灵能回响能吸引拒生花，那就让战术小队护送{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}灵能者{/g}深入墓穴。这支小队的生还概率极低。此外，我们无法预知拒生花对那些铁块死人的杀伤效果，也不知道它们会在墓穴中停留多久。”
languages.original_text: "The second option involves utilising the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}'s findings. A small tactical team will escort the {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."

traits.locale_text: “方案二是利用{g|Encyclopedia:Magos}贤者{/g}的研究成果。既然灵能回响能吸引拒生花，那就让战术小队护送{g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}灵能者{/g}深入墓穴。这支小队的生还概率极低。此外，我们无法预知拒生花对那些铁块死人的杀伤效果，也不知道它们会在墓穴中停留多久。”

languages.text: "Die zweite Option basiert auf den Erkenntnissen der {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g}. Ein kleines taktisches Team wird die {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}Psioniker{/g} tiefer in das Grab bringen. Die Treiber werden von psionischen Echos angelockt. Die Überlebenschancen der Gruppe sind minimal, und wir wissen nicht, was die Kreaturen gegen die Eisentoten ausrichten. Oder wie lange sie im Grab bleiben, ehe sie sich zurückziehen."
languages.original_text: "The second option involves utilising the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}'s findings. A small tactical team will escort the {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."

traits.locale_text: "Die zweite Option basiert auf den Erkenntnissen der {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magi{/g}. Ein kleines taktisches Team wird die {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}Psioniker{/g} tiefer in das Grab bringen. Die Treiber werden von psionischen Echos angelockt. Die Überlebenschancen der Gruppe sind minimal, und wir wissen nicht, was die Kreaturen gegen die Eisentoten ausrichten. Oder wie lange sie im Grab bleiben, ehe sie sich zurückziehen."

languages.text: "İkinci seçenek, {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos'un{/g} bulgularını kullanmayı içeriyor. Küçük bir taktik ekibi, {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}ruhsezerlere{/g} mezarın derinliklerine kadar eşlik edecek. Ruhsezi yankıları, Çobanları çekiyor. Grubun hayatta kalma ihtimali çok düşük, ayrıca yaratıkların demir ölülere karşı ne kadar etkili olacağını bilmiyoruz. Ayrılmadan önce mezarda ne kadar kalacaklarını da."
languages.original_text: "The second option involves utilising the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}'s findings. A small tactical team will escort the {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} deep into the tomb. Psychic echoes are what draw the Drovers. The group's chances of survival are minimal, and we do not know how effective the creatures will be against the iron dead. Or how long they will remain in the tomb before leaving."

traits.locale_text: "İkinci seçenek, {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos'un{/g} bulgularını kullanmayı içeriyor. Küçük bir taktik ekibi, {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}ruhsezerlere{/g} mezarın derinliklerine kadar eşlik edecek. Ruhsezi yankıları, Çobanları çekiyor. Grubun hayatta kalma ihtimali çok düşük, ayrıca yaratıkların demir ölülere karşı ne kadar etkili olacağını bilmiyoruz. Ayrılmadan önce mezarda ne kadar kalacaklarını da."

languages.text: « Notre deuxième option implique d'exploiter les découvertes de notre {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}magos{/g}. Une petite équipe stratégique escorterait les {g|Encyclopedia:PsykerGlossary}psykers{/g} dans les profondeurs du tombeau. Ce sont les échos psychiques qui attirent les Chasseurs. Les chances de survie du groupe sont extrêmement limitées, et nous ne savons pas si les créatures seraient efficaces contre les morts de fer ni combien de temps elles resteraient dans le tombeau. »
languages.original_text: "The second option involves utilising the {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}Magos{/g}'s findings.
